titleStmt.title: SII 35.101: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 101. (A.R. No. 37 of 1950-51.) AKKIVAŠł∂Šł∂I, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near Kallappa temple.
This inscription refers itself to the reign of Vńęra-Mallidńďva a Kadamba king (A.D. 12171259) and is dated NandńĀna, VaiŇõńĀkha Ňõu. 10, Monday. It may be assigned to 13th century A.D.
It records a gift of wet land to the priest of BhuvanńďŇõvara. Mentions the teacher VńĀmaŇõakti of Bikńďsara.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:

kesarada yńĀcńĀrya vńĀmasakti

ŠĻüu mŇęŠłćase hakalu kaŠĻĀba ha
nneraŠłću biŠĻ≠a dharma yiŠĻĀtu dńďvara kalu
vesana nńĀŠłći tipureya vńĀmaya pńĀ
da gade kaŠĻĀba yńĀŠĻüu yiŠĻĀtńę dharma
maŠĻĀ pratipńĀŠł∑isidavargge gaŠĻĀge vńĀraŠĻáńĀ
si prayńĀgeyargbyatńęrtthadalu sńĀsi
ra kavileyaŠĻĀ sńĀsirvvavńďdapńĀraga
rappa brńĀhmaŠĻáarggeyubheyamu
khigoŠĻ≠ŠĻ≠a palamakku maŠĻĀgaŠł∑a mahńĀŇõrńę

ŠĻ£ŠĻ≠ńĀyńĀŠĻĀ jńĀyatńď krimi .
